_comment: Frozen T2V evaluation set for Lance. 480p × 50 frames @ 12 fps per upstream defaults. seed=42 across all prompts.

prompts.prompt: A horse galloping across an open meadow under a partly cloudy sky, mane flowing, side-tracking camera, telephoto compression.
Tropical reef teeming with schools of small fish darting between coral, sunlight filtering through clear water, slow camera drift.
Rain-soaked neon alley in a cyberpunk city at night, rain falling, reflections shimmering in puddles, steam rising.
A contemporary dancer rehearsing in a sunlit studio, slow controlled movement, dust motes in the light.
A distant thunderstorm over the great plains at twilight, occasional lightning illuminating the clouds.
A Pixar-style 3D animated rabbit hopping through a cartoon meadow with exaggerated motion and squash-and-stretch.
An anime-style scene of a train passing through a snowy mountain pass at twilight, soft falling snow.
Close-up of hot coffee being poured into a ceramic mug, steam rising, kitchen counter softly out of focus.
